BIH-QAT.summary: Bosnia-Herzegovina is 3rd with 4 points, likely advancing. Qatar is eliminated in 4th place with 1 point.

SUI-CAN.summary: Switzerland is 1st with 7 points, qualified. Canada is 2nd with 4 points, also qualified for knockout stage.

MAR-HAI.summary: Morocco needs a win or draw to secure automatic qualification. Haiti needs a massive win for any slim hope of advancing.

SCO-BRA.summary: Scotland needs a win for automatic qualification. Brazil needs a win or draw to secure their spot in the knockout stage.

CZE-MEX.summary: Mexico is already qualified and playing for group winner seeding. Czechia needs a win and help for a slim chance to advance.

RSA-KOR.summary: South Korea needs a win to guarantee automatic qualification. South Africa needs a win and help for a slim chance to advance.

CUW-CIV.summary: Curaçao needs a win for any slim hope of 3rd place; a draw or loss eliminates them. Ivory Coast seeks top-2.

ECU-GER.summary: Ecuador needs a win and goal difference swing for top-2, or a draw for 3rd. Germany is already qualified.

JPN-SWE.summary: Japan and Sweden both need a win to guarantee top-2, or a draw for a strong 3rd place chance.

TUN-NED.summary: Tunisia is eliminated. Netherlands needs a draw to guarantee top-2, or a win for 1st place.

PAR-AUS.summary: Paraguay and Australia both need a win to secure top-2 or a strong 3rd place spot.

TUR-USA.summary: Türkiye is eliminated. United States is already qualified, playing for group seeding.

NOR-FRA.summary: Norway and France are both qualified for the next round. This match determines who wins Group I.

SEN-IRQ.summary: Both Senegal and Iraq are already eliminated from World Cup contention, playing only for pride.

CPV-KSA.summary: Both Cape Verde and Saudi Arabia need a victory to have any realistic chance of advancing.

URU-ESP.summary: Spain needs a draw to guarantee qualification. Uruguay needs a win to secure advancement.

EGY-IRN.summary: Egypt needs a draw to guarantee qualification. Iran needs a win to secure advancement.

NZL-BEL.summary: Both New Zealand and Belgium need a victory to have a realistic chance of advancing.
